prestazioni: Engine swap to a Duramax 6.6L L5P (engine code: L5P) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Slee Offroad, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm inducer) and a custom 4-inch downpipe by MBRP for reduced backpressure

Full custom fuel system upgrade featuring dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 2000cc Delphi injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator, controlled via an AEM Infinity 10 standalone ECU with custom tuning by Dyno Dynamics

Heavy-duty drivetrain reinforcement including a South Bend dual-disc clutch (rated for 1,200 lb-ft), a custom 4L85E transmission built by Sun Coast with a 3,000-stall torque converter, and a Dana 70 front axle with ARB Air Locker and 5.38 gear ratio from Nitro Gear & Axle
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Hummer H1 Alpha Rocket Bunny-inspired kit by Liberty Walk, featuring carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all painted in PPG 'Military Matte Green' with a satin clear coat

Full custom interior overhaul with Recaro SR-7 racing seats wrapped in Alcantara and green Nappa leather by Katzkin, paired with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub

Aggressive off-road lighting setup featuring a Baja Designs Squadron Pro 50-inch LED light bar mounted on a custom front bumper by Fab Fours, with auxiliary Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED pods on the A-pillars and a custom rear roof rack by Prinsu Design Studio
